summary: Define bounded M7 Beta content lock contract
acceptance_criteria: Define the minimum Beta content-lock contract: scenario/person/event scope, required review states, defect-only post-lock policy, and allowed explicit balance-tuning window.
Map every M7 Roadmap and acceptance-matrix item to downstream tasks and evidence without implementing content, code, platform behavior, release artifacts, or product scope changes.
Define formal content lock acceptance as a Human Gate; this task may prepare the gate but must not approve it.
Carry forward M6_GATE = PASS_WITH_LIMITS, including Alpha scaffolding, local adviser evidence, batch tuning risk, and unsigned desktop smoke limits.
Preserve DEFER_MANUAL_NODE_BATTLE exactly and state that manual node battle is only a post-1.0 non-blocking candidate unless a later Human Gate reverses it.
required_tests: node -e JSON parse/shape check for M7-CONTENT-LOCK-CONTRACT-001

gameplay_designer.next_action: Await formal route message, then execute the planning-only content lock contract task.

notes: First executable downstream M7 task after the task graph is accepted; planning-only contract work.
M6_GATE remains PASS_WITH_LIMITS and must not be rewritten as unconditional PASS or release readiness.
Manual node battle remains DEFER_MANUAL_NODE_BATTLE; this task must not create implementation, M7/M8 blocking spike, research, validation, or exit-gate dependency for manual node battle.
Player and AI behavior must continue through the same GameCommand/query/save surfaces where implementation work is later authorized.
sim-core must remain decoupled from React, Pixi, Electron, DOM, Node IO, real time APIs, hidden RPC, and object-graph serialization.
Stop and route to the named reviewer or Human Gate if allowed paths are insufficient, required tests cannot run, or a Human Gate decision is needed.
human_gates: manual playthrough acceptance where human judgment is required
commercial, release, store, branding, logo, or trademark decisions
telemetry, analytics, remote collection, accounts, paid services, or secrets
arbitrary-code mods, runtime scripting extensions, or Workshop support
cloud-save implementation, network persistence, or any account-backed save service
frozen product, platform, core architecture, technology stack, simulation authority, deterministic, or historical-policy changes
manual node battle reversal or any formal 1.0 scope reversal
next_action: gameplay_designer writer defines the planning-only M7 Beta content lock contract, writes a REVIEW handoff, and routes to systems_architect.
